'''鈭歵h-b-sh-s''' ('''kathabshesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jackaroo|jackaroo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jackaroo|jackaroo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-b-sh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kathabshesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithabshesoko|thithabshesoko]] || [[word:jithabshesoko|jithabshesoko]] || [[word:shithabshesoko|shithabshesoko]] || [[word:kithabshesoko|kithabshesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthabshesoko|thuthuthabshesoko]] || [[word:jujuthabshesoko|jujuthabshesoko]] || [[word:shushuthabshesoko|shushuthabshesoko]] || [[word:kukuthabshesoko|kukuthabshesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthabshesoko|thuthabshesoko]] || [[word:juthabshesoko|juthabshesoko]] || [[word:shuthabshesoko|shuthabshesoko]] || [[word:kuthabshesoko|kuthabshesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthabshesoko|thuthabshesoko]] || [[word:juthabshesoko|juthabshesoko]] || [[word:shuthabshesoko|shuthabshesoko]] || [[word:kuthabshesoko|kuthabshesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothabshesoko|thothabshesoko]] || [[word:jothabshesoko|jothabshesoko]] || [[word:shothabshesoko|shothabshesoko]] || [[word:kothabshesoko|kothabshesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thabshesoko|th忙thabshesoko]] || [[word:j忙thabshesoko|j忙thabshesoko]] || [[word:sh忙thabshesoko|sh忙thabshesoko]] || [[word:k忙thabshesoko|k忙thabshesoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathabshesoko|thathabshesoko]] || [[word:jathabshesoko|jathabshesoko]] || [[word:shathabshesoko|shathabshesoko]] || [[word:kathabshesoko|kathabshesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
